locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: 6 control valves inspected, all found in open position
Sprinkler heads visual condition fair — minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet — adequate supply
deficiencies: Minor corrosion observed on sprinkler heads
Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Remove combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors to maintain proper clearance
Repair exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in main electrical room
Connect all tamper switches on control valves

overall_assessment.summary: Dry pipe sprinkler system (20 years old, Reliable manufacturer) is NFPA 13 compliant with operational alarms and adequate water supply. System passed overall inspection but has deficiencies including unconnected tamper switches, minor sprinkler head corrosion, combustible storage clearance issues, and electrical code violations.
